llm_raw.summary: This image fails critical regulatory checks: the required bilingual nicotine warning, 18+ icon, and risk communication text are all missing. The ZONNIC logo is present and detected in white on a grey background, which is only compliant for dark backgrounds, not for grey/gradient backgrounds where navy blue is required. Several checks could not be fully verified due to missing signals (e.g., font analysis, gradient direction), requiring manual review. No evidence of C halo presence or correct logo structure could be confirmed.

checks_performed.detail: No nicotine warning text detected at the top of the image. Required bilingual warning (English and French) is missing.
No 18+ icon detected in the image.
No risk communication text detected at the bottom of the image.
ZONNIC text detected via OCR at position (75,27)-(244,65) with 98.9% confidence — logo presence confirmed per LOGO-01.
Logo text is white on a grey background. Per guidelines, navy blue is required on grey/gradient backgrounds.
Unable to verify C halo presence, colour, or correctness — shape detection not available. Requires manual review.
Unable to fully verify logo integrity (gradients, outlines, stacking) — visual analysis not available. Requires manual review.
Background classified as grey based on dense captions ('a white letter on a grey background').
Unable to verify gradient direction or split — color_gradient_analysis not available. Requires manual review.
Unable to determine content type (flavour-led, educational, brand purpose) from available signals. Requires manual review.
Unable to verify full colour palette compliance — dominant_colors and color_matching not available. Requires manual review.
Unable to verify Santral font usage or NRT lockup formatting — font_analysis not available. Requires manual review.
Unable to verify grey gradient opacity or format — opacity_detection not available. Requires manual review.
Unable to verify logo safety zone — object_detection and spatial_analysis not available. Requires manual review.
Unable to verify halo blending, flavour mismatch, or logo in shapes — color_analysis and shape_detection not available. Requires manual review.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement detected at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top of the creative.
violations.evidence: No text matching the required warning detected via OCR or text detection.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements (nicotine warning at top, risk communication and 18+ icon at bottom) are missing.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning at the top and both the risk communication text and 18+ icon at the bottom.
violations.evidence: No such elements detected in the image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warning statements at the top of the asset.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a circular 18+ icon at the bottom of the creative.
violations.evidence: No 18+ icon detected via shape or text detection.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom of the creative.
violations.evidence: No text matching the required risk communication statement detected.

violations.rule_text: On gradient backgrounds, the word ZONNIC must always be set in navy blue (#242c65).
violations.issue: Logo text is white on a grey background; navy blue is required.
violations.fix_suggestion: Change the ZONNIC logo text to navy blue (#242c65) when used on grey/gradient backgrounds.
violations.evidence: Dense captions: 'a logo with white text', 'a white letter on a grey background'. OCR detected white text.

passed_details.detail: ZONNIC text detected via OCR at position (75,27)-(244,65) with 98.9% confidence — logo presence confirmed.
Unable to fully verify logo text colour on light image backgrounds — background is grey, not light image. Requires manual review if used on image.
